# Starfly — machine-readable doc index
# https://starfly.dev/llms.txt

> Starfly secures agents without replacing your IdP. RFC 8693 exchange, WIMSE JWTs, OPA policy, CAEP revocation, MCP verification, federation sync.

## Site

- https://starfly.dev — product home
- https://starfly.dev/1.0/docs/ — documentation hub (Starlight + Pagefind)
- https://starfly.dev/terraform/ — Terraform provider
- https://starfly.dev/api/ — OpenAPI reference
- https://starfly.dev/play/ — sandbox playground

## Repository

- https://github.com/raygj/project-starfly-fabrics — public source (service, provider, docs, website)

## Agent bootstrap

- AGENTS.md — agents read first; run sandbox before suggesting integration
- sandbox/manifest.yaml — profiles and five use cases (source of truth)
- sandbox/run.sh — proof scripts

## Documentation v1.0

- /1.0/docs/getting-started/ — first WIMSE JWT in 15 minutes
- /1.0/docs/glossary/ — trust domain vs audience, full vocabulary
- /1.0/docs/ecosystem/ — fabric map (Starfly PEP + optional companions)
- /1.0/docs/ecosystem/calm-forge/ — design-time graph (partner repo)
- /1.0/docs/ecosystem/reflector/ — eBPF platform senses (Preview)
- /1.0/docs/ecosystem/ssf-relay/ — CAEP/SSF fan-out (Preview)
- /1.0/docs/ecosystem/reasoner/ — design vs runtime coherence (Preview)
- /1.0/docs/ecosystem/lpa-crypto-heart/ — signed policy bundles (Preview)
- /1.0/docs/concepts/exchange/ — token exchange hot path
- /1.0/docs/concepts/revocation/ — kill switch
- /1.0/docs/concepts/trust-domains/ — inbound identity plane
- /1.0/docs/integrators/token-exchange/ — RFC 8693 integrator guide
- /1.0/docs/integrators/credential-patterns/ — SPIFFE, K8s, Vault OIDC, cloud WI → WIMSE
- /1.0/docs/integrators/mcp/ — confused deputy mitigation
- /1.0/docs/integrators/utc/ — multi-protocol tool verification
- /1.0/docs/integrators/dashboard/ — ops NOC (async, not hot path)
- /1.0/docs/integrators/starfly-graph/ — runtime KG (async consumer)

## Terraform provider

- /terraform/quickstart/ — build provider from terraform-provider/
- /terraform/resources/ — starfly_fabric, mcp_tool, ssf_stream, agent_identity, encryption_key
- /terraform/auth/ — mTLS and JWT migration

## Invariants

- Exchange hot path — no new synchronous deps on exchange pipeline
- Revocation kill switch — propagation latency not negotiable
